text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, this should be far enough...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship! You won't escape me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're still following me?! You're as tenacious as
a komodo dragon!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I have my own countermeasures...
Activating frilled lizard mode! You'll never catch
me now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Eat my dust!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... You were just standing there watching?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I could have used some help apprehending that
hooligan...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...It's not your fault. I'm just venting. My bad.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Gold Ship sure is something else though. As a member of the student council, I can't allow her pranks to go unchecked...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But trying to catch a student running wild is quite
the task when I can only use sixty percent of my
full speed.
choice_data_list: Going all out isn't in the cards, huh?
Going all out isn't in the cards, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course it isn't. The law stipulates that
Umamusume aren't allowed to run at full speed
outside of designated areas.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're capable of reaching speeds in excess of
fifty kilometers per hour. Were we to run into
someone or something, the damage caused would
be catastrophic.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's quite frustrating seeing her slip out of my
grasp like that...
choice_data_list: Why don't we get some help?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's quite frustrating seeing her slip out of my
grasp like that...
choice_data_list: Why don't we get some help?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you right in the head? I couldn't catch her
running at sixty percent speed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
With your legs, even running at full tilt, you
wouldn't be able to so much as brush your
fingertips against the tip of her tail.
choice_data_list: We'll come up with a plan.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A plan, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If you have a countermeasure in mind,
I'd be happy to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and I come up with various strategies
to capture Gold Ship, and soon enough...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's the deal with you guys?! Are you outta
your heads?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Didn't your momma ever teach you that it's lame
to ambush in tag?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My mother and I had no such rule when we used
to play racewalk tag!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you used to play some kinda special-rules
tag with your mom? I gotta hear all about this!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're in big trouble when we get back to the
academy, you know. I hope you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You can't press charges when there ain't no crime!
Heeelp! The Empress has gone rogue! It's an
autocracy over heeere!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Enough with your nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she doesn't make it easy, we manage to
apprehend the runaway Golshi in the end.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An ally? We're dealing with Gold Ship here. I
doubt we'd find anybody up to the—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Actually...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There just might be someone capable of
controlling Gold Ship's unfathomable comings
and goings!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, like, what is it you need exactly?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll explain later. Just wait there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Howdy-do, Jordan! Hoo boy, I wanna smack that
back of yours more than ever today!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Not cool! Where did you even come from?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was perfect, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hold the phone—Air Groove? Are you telling me this was a trap?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed it was. And now I have you! Time to
answer for your crimes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My life is flashing before my eyes! See you on the
other side, folks...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone needs to just, like, hold the phone for a
sec...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I have literally zero idea what's going on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I end up having to calm Tosen
Jordan down. As for Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After another brief chase, she finally manages to
apprehend Gold Ship once and for all.
